title: Poisoned Food For Item Snatcher
description: Addon for Item Snatcher mod, then adds a craft for original food. I.e you can use a item snatcher and any poisoned food from mod to get original variant
body:
Addon for Poisoned Food and Item Snatcher mods, then add a craft for original food from poisoned

How to use?
==
You need to use item snatcher and any poisoned food to make a original food
